# Advocate Md. Shah Alam — Law Chambers

> Official website of Advocate Md. Shah Alam, Supreme Court Advocate of Bangladesh. 10+ years experience in Criminal Law, Family Law, Land Law, Company Law and Tax Law. Chamber in Uttara, Dhaka.

## About

Advocate Md. Shah Alam is a practicing lawyer at the Supreme Court of Bangladesh. He is a former Assistant Public Prosecutor at the Metro Sessions Court, Dhaka. He holds an LL.M from Dhaka International University and has over 10 years of active legal practice in Bangladesh.

- Name: Advocate Md. Shah Alam
- Title: Advocate, Supreme Court of Bangladesh
- Former: Assistant Public Prosecutor, Metro Sessions Court, Dhaka
- Location: Uttara, Dhaka, Bangladesh
- Phone: +8801712122102
- Email: contact@advmdshahalam.me
- Website: https://www.advmdshahalam.me

## Legal Services

- Criminal Law & Defence
- Bail Applications (All Courts + High Court)
- Divorce & Family Law (Muslim, Hindu, Christian)
- Land & Property Law
- Company & Corporate Law
- Tax & VAT Law
- Writ Petitions (Supreme Court)
- Cyber Crime Defence

## Practice Courts

- Supreme Court of Bangladesh (High Court Division & Appellate Division)
- Metro Sessions Court, Dhaka
- All District & Sessions Courts, Bangladesh
- Family Courts, Bangladesh
- Magistrate Courts, Bangladesh

## Education

- LL.M — Dhaka International University (2010)
- LL.B & Bar Council — Metro Police Ideal Law College, Dhaka (2008)
- LL.B — Gazipur Law College, Gazipur (2006)
- BBA, MBA — Asian University of Bangladesh (2004–2007)
